mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.user_id AS userId, p.title, p.content, p.count_read AS countRead, p.count_like AS countLike, u.username AS userUsername, u.name AS userName, u.nick AS userNick FROM post p JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE p.id = #{id}

SELECT p.id, p.user_id AS userId, p.title, p.content, p.count_read AS countRead, p.count_like AS countLike, u.username AS userUsername, u.name AS userName, u.nick AS userNick FROM post p JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%') ORDER BY p.id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post WHERE title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%')

SELECT p.id, p.user_id AS userId, p.title, p.content, p.count_read AS countRead, p.count_like AS countLike, u.username AS userUsername, u.name AS userName, u.nick AS userNick FROM post p JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE p.id < #{lastId} ORDER BY p.id DESC LIMIT #{size}
